rows.description: 10 per cent on Estates, Supp Divd 1880
rows.notes: Pounds '66' clear. Shillings '13' and pence '6' confirmed visually, aligning with `gpt-5-mini`. `gemini-flash` had 19s 1d. A distinct loop after the pence '6' is interpreted as 0.75 (three-farthings), aligning with `gpt-5-mini`'s specific observation and the fraction ambiguity rule.

Amounts '373.8.6' clear from both extractors. A distinct loop similar to the previous row is present after the pence '6', interpreted as 0.75 (three-farthings). `gpt-5-mini` correctly identified the fraction while `gemini-flash` missed it.
Consensus across all extractors. Visually confirmed '234.8.6' with no fraction.

Visually confirmed '7.4.0'. `gemini-flash` was correct for pence ('0'); `gpt-5-mini` misread it as '6'. No fraction is visible. Description slightly modified to remove trailing period from `gpt-5-mini`.

Visually confirmed 'Masters Composition' is a header, as identified by `gpt-5-mini`. It has no associated monetary amount. `gemini-flash` incorrectly merged this description with the following entry's amount and classified it as an entry.

Amounts '22.3.0' confirmed visually and by consensus. The description '1 Domus 10.5.0, Local Rents 7.3.0' is a more complete reading (`gemini-flash`'s base, adjusted to remove 'Master Composition' and start with '1'). Embedded amounts total £17.8.0, differing from the main entry amount.

Amounts '11.8.6' confirmed visually and by consensus. The description '2 Domus 9.10.0 Local Rents 13.18.6' is a more complete reading (from `gemini-flash`). Embedded amounts total £23.8.6, differing from the main entry amount.
Visually confirmed '3. Nil' and no associated amount. `gpt-5-mini` was more accurate on the description; `gemini-flash` only extracted '3'.
Visually confirmed amount is '-.3.0'. `gemini-flash` was correct. The pounds column is clearly blank/dashed. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly read '3' in the pounds column.
Consensus across all extractors. Visually confirmed '43.0.0'.

rows.description: Int on £57.10-at 3 per Ct 1.14.4 by Plator
rows.notes: Visually confirmed main amount is '4.4.4'. `gemini-flash` correctly extracted the main column amount and noted the embedded calculation '1.14.4' in the description. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly extracted the embedded value as the main amount and misread 'Plator' as 'Acton'.

Visually confirmed main amount is '4.4.4'. `gemini-flash` correctly extracted the main column amount and noted the embedded calculation '2.10.0' in the description. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly extracted the embedded value as the main amount and missed the embedded value in the description.

Visually confirmed marginal date 'July 14' as a header. `gpt-5-mini` was more accurate; `gemini-flash` missed the '14'.

Visually confirmed that '122.15.0' is an embedded amount within the description, with no corresponding entry in the main amount columns. `gemini-flash` correctly identified this and the surname. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly extracted the embedded value as a main amount and misread the surname as 'Shortlands'.

Visually confirmed that '93.3.4' is an embedded amount within the description, with no corresponding entry in the main amount columns. `gemini-flash` correctly identified this. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly extracted the embedded value as a main amount.

Visually confirmed that '46.19.8' is an embedded amount within the description, with no corresponding entry in the main amount columns. `gemini-flash` correctly identified this and the surname. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly extracted the embedded value as a main amount and misread the surname as 'Trukell'.

rows.description: Stock of the three funds Total 607.17.4
rows.notes: Visually confirmed that '607.17.4' is an embedded amount within the description, with no corresponding entry in the main amount columns. `gemini-flash` correctly identified this. `gpt-5-mini` hallucinated a main amount ('6067.17.4') and misread the description ('sold').

Visually confirmed main amount is '22.17.4'. `gemini-flash` correctly extracted the main column amount and noted the embedded calculation '347.4.0' in the description. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly extracted the embedded value as the main amount and missed it from the description.

This subtotal was missed by `gemini-flash`. Visually reads '22 / 7 / 19 / 4' to the right of the main amounts. Interpreted as `£22 7s 19d`. Corrected 19 pence (a hard rule violation) to 1 shilling 7 pence, resulting in a final value of `£22 8s 7d`. The trailing '4' is disregarded as it does not fit the fraction schema. `gpt-5-mini` misread the value entirely as '2277 19 4' and correctly identified it as a total.
Consensus across all extractors. Visually confirmed marginal date 'July 1' as a header.
